description:
Pre-existing ship-blocker surfaced by mutagen-hcs.7's audit (2026-06-23). NOT introduced by .7 — the crashing line is byte-identical at base 0926844.

## Bug
`mix mutagen --stream` hard-crashes with a FunctionClauseError before emitting any NDJSON line. Root cause: lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (maybe_emit_stream_end / the stream-end envelope) calls `Map.from_struct(report.meta || %{})`, but `report.meta` is a PLAIN MAP — base_report builds `meta: %{...}` and the Report type is `meta: map() | nil`; there is NO Report.Meta struct. So `Map.from_struct/1` raises on every `--stream` invocation (reproduced at both --max-concurrency 1 and >1). The progress/stream composition is correct but never reached.

This advertises a flag that crashes on first use — exactly the kind of embarrassing-first-release gap this epic exists to prevent.

## Why it was hidden
test/mutagen_ex/json_streamer_test.exs only calls `MutagenEx.JsonStreamer.emit_start/3` (and friends) directly with a hand-built plain map; the real Mix-task `--stream` CLI path has ZERO integration coverage.

## Fix (in scope)
- Replace `Map.from_struct(report.meta || %{})` with `(report.meta || %{})` (meta is already a plain map) — or whatever the stream-end envelope actually needs. Verify the full stream-start + per-site + stream-end envelope sequence emits valid NDJSON.
- Add a REAL `--stream` CLI integration test: drive `mix mutagen --stream ...` (subprocess or Mix.Task) on a tiny scope, assert it exits 0 and emits well-formed line-delimited JSON envelopes (start/result/end) with the documented kinds, AND that it coexists with progress (progress on stderr, NDJSON on the json sink). This closes the coverage gap that hid the bug.

## Out of scope
- Do not change the NDJSON schema/kinds themselves (only fix the crash + add coverage).
- Do not touch telemetry (removed in .7) or the package files: whitelist (.1).

## Acceptance
- `mix mutagen --stream` on a real scope exits 0 and emits valid NDJSON (no FunctionClauseError).
- New CLI-level --stream integration test added and green.
- `mix test` + `make smoke` green.
title: Fix mix mutagen --stream crash (Map.from_struct on plain map) + add CLI streaming integration test
